# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Storage Account with blob containers for static website hosting. Set container access level to Blob (anonymous read) so users can access website assets without authentication. This is for our public-facing website storage.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud storage security.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019/04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "minLength": 3,
      "maxLength": 24,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the storage account for static website hosting"
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Location for the storage account"
      }
    },
    "indexDocumentPath": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "index.html",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The index document for the static website"
      }
    },
    "errorDocument404Path": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "404.html",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The 404 error document for the static website"
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "storageAccountName": "[toLower(parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
      "name": "[variables('storageAccountName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "kind": "StorageV2",
      "sku": {
        "name": "Standard_LRS"
      },
      "properties": {
        "accessTier": "Hot",
        "supportsHttpsTrafficOnly": true,
        "minimumTlsVersion": "TLS1_2",
        "allowBlobPublicAccess": false,
        "allowSharedKeyAccess": false,
        "networkAcls": {
          "defaultAction": "Deny",
          "bypass": "AzureServices",
          "ipRules": [],
          "virtualNetworkRules": []
        },
        "encryption": {
          "services": {
            "blob": {
              "enabled": true,
              "keyType": "Account"
            }
          },
          "keySource": "Microsoft.Storage"
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
      "name": "[concat(variables('storageAccountName'), '/default')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('storageAccountName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "deleteRetentionPolicy": {
          "enabled": true,
          "days": 7
        },
        "containerDeleteRetentionPolicy": {
          "enabled": true,
          "days": 7
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
      "name": "[concat(variables('storageAccountName'), '/default/$web')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices', variables('storageAccountName'), 'default')]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "publicAccess": "None",
        "metadata": {
          "purpose": "static-website-hosting"
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Resources/deploymentScripts",
      "apiVersion": "2020-10-01",
      "name": "enableStaticWebsite",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "kind": "AzurePowerShell",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('storageAccountName'))]"
      ],
      "identity": {
        "type": "UserAssigned",
        "userAssignedIdentities": {}
      },
      "properties": {
        "azPowerShellVersion": "9.0",
        "scriptContent": "[concat('$ctx = New-AzStorageContext -StorageAccountName \"', variables('storageAccountName'), '\" -UseConnectedAccount; Enable-AzStorageStaticWebsite -Context $ctx -IndexDocument \"', parameters('indexDocumentPath'), '\" -ErrorDocument404Path \"', parameters('errorDocument404Path'), '\"')]",
        "timeout": "PT10M",
        "cleanupPreference": "OnSuccess",
        "retentionInterval": "PT1H"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Cdn/profiles",
      "apiVersion": "2023-05-01",
      "name": "[concat(variables('storageAccountName'), '-cdn')]",
      "location": "Global",
      "sku": {
        "name": "Standard_Microsoft"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('storageAccountName'))]"
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Cdn/profiles/endpoints",
      "apiVersion": "2023-05-01",
      "name": "[concat(variables('storageAccountName'), '-cdn/', variables('storageAccountName'), '-endpoint')]",
      "location": "Global",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Cdn/profiles', concat(variables('storageAccountName'), '-cdn'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "isHttpAllowed": false,
        "isHttpsAllowed": true,
        "originHostHeader": "[replace(replace(reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('storageAccountName'))).primaryEndpoints.web, 'https://', ''), '/', '')]",
        "origins": [
          {
            "name": "static-website-origin",
            "properties": {
              "hostName": "[replace(replace(reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('storageAccountName'))).primaryEndpoints.web, 'https://', ''), '/', '')]",
              "httpsPort": 443,
              "originHostHeader": "[replace(replace(reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('storageAccountName'))).primaryEndpoints.web, 'https://', ''), '/', '')]"
            }
          }
        ],
        "isCompressionEnabled": true,
        "contentTypesToCompress": [
          "text/html",
          "text/css",
          "application/javascript",
          "application/json",
          "image/svg+xml",
          "application/xml",
          "text/plain"
        ]
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "storageAccountId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('storageAccountName'))]"
    },
    "staticWebsiteUrl": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('storageAccountName'))).primaryEndpoints.web]"
    },
    "cdnEndpointUrl": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[concat('https://', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Cdn/profiles/endpoints', concat(variables('storageAccountName'), '-cdn'), concat(variables('storageAccountName'), '-endpoint'))).hostName)]"
    },
    "securityNote": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "This deployment uses Azure Static Website hosting with CDN instead of anonymous blob access. The $web container uses private access (publicAccess: None). Public read access is provided securely through the static website endpoint and CDN with HTTPS-only. Shared key access is disabled; use Azure AD (Entra ID) for management operations."
    }
  }
}
